summary: The diff implements all required features: diagram naming with SaveDiagramDialog, LoadDiagramDialog for selection, clear button in toolbar, PNG export (simplified message), free transform tool fixes in AttackPathCanvas, bidirectional arrow removal from AttackPathToolbar and AttackPathIcon, and backend support for named diagrams with migration. All requirements appear fully implemented with evidence in the modified files.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for upgrading existing diagram storage to support multiple named diagrams per user
hallucinated_features.reason: backend/migration.mo was added to migrate old single-diagram storage to new multi-diagram storage with indexing, but this migration functionality was not requested in the BuildRequest

hallucinated_features.description: Multi-diagram storage with indexing by Nat ID per user
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend was changed to store multiple diagrams per user with Map<Nat, NamedDiagram> structure and ID-based retrieval via getDiagramStateById, but the BuildRequest only mentioned storing diagram names, not implementing a multi-diagram system with numeric IDs

hallucinated_features.description: getAllDiagrams backend method and frontend hook
hallucinated_features.reason: Added backend method to retrieve all diagrams for a user and corresponding frontend hook useGetAllDiagrams, which extends beyond the requirement to simply display saved diagram names in the load dialog

hallucinated_features.description: Rotation handle and rotation state for transform tool
hallucinated_features.reason: AttackPathCanvas includes rotationHandle, rotationStart state and rotation logic not mentioned in REQ-57 which only specified move and resize functionality
